title: Wolf Summon
description: Ever get tired of your pets wandering off?
body:
Ever get tired of your wolves wandering off?
Well call them to your side by tapping sneak 6 times

Perm node:
wolfsummon.use

_Now works on cats, horses and Happy Ghasts
config files has many options_


### Functionality:
Sneak x 6 to trigger summons

### Wolves:
- Call tame standing wolves (Empty **main hand**)
- Call tame sitting and standing wolves (Stick **in main hand**)
- Force all tame wolves to sit (Bone **in main hand**)

### Horses:
- Call tame unleashed horses (Wheat **in main hand**)
- Call tame unleashed and leashed horses (Carrot **in main hand**)

### Cats:
- Call tame standing cats (Cooked Cod **in main hand**)
- Call tame sitting and standing cats (Feather **in main hand**)

### Happy Ghast:
**Command /happyclaim:**
- while riding a happy ghast type the command to claim the happy ghast
- Call claimed unleashed happy ghasts (Snowball **in main hand**)
- Call claimed unleashed and leashed happy ghasts (Ghast Tear **in main hand**)
  
### Nautilus:
- Call tame unleashed Nautilus (Pufferfish **in main hand**)
- Call tame unleashed and leashed Nautilus (Nautilus Shell **in main hand**)

Discord: ronon_omega
if it's broken in some debilitating way, flick me a message
